site.title: ProBall Football — Football Academy Jakarta
site.description: ProBall Football Academy in Jakarta. 700+ members. Professional coaching for ages 5–16. Subscribe monthly for weekly training sessions.

hero.label: Jakarta's Leading Football Academy Since 2019
hero.body: ProBall Football Academy — dedicated to helping players of all levels achieve their goals. Join 700+ members training across Jakarta.

howItWorks.label: Simple & proven
howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Begin with a free trial session to experience the ProBall Method firsthand.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Select your preferred location and weekly schedule. Commit at the start of each month.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Train weekly with certified coaches. Miss a session? Join any ProBall location as a makeup.

orderTypes.label: Flexible options
orderTypes.heading: Trial session or monthly membership
orderTypes.oneTimeDesc: Try a single session with no commitment. Perfect for first-time players.
orderTypes.subscriptionDesc: Train every week with full access to makeup sessions at any ProBall location.

paymentTrust.label: Secure & trustworthy
paymentTrust.heading: Payment you can trust
paymentTrust.note: All payments are processed securely through Xendit, Indonesia's leading payment platform. Your data is encrypted and protected.

products.selectAlertDesc: Click any plan above to continue to checkout

checkout.paymentNote: You'll select your payment method on Xendit's secure payment page. No selection needed here.
checkout.validationDetails: Please complete all your details (name, valid email, and valid phone number)
checkout.validationAddress: Please complete your registration details (address, city, and postal code)

paymentSuccess.heading: Registration Confirmed!
paymentSuccess.body: Thank you for joining ProBall Football. Your training schedule is set and you'll hear from us soon.
paymentSuccess.step1Desc: Your training schedule will be confirmed by our team
paymentSuccess.step2Desc: A confirmation email with registration details has been sent

paymentFailed.heading: Payment Unsuccessful
paymentFailed.body: We weren't able to process your payment. Don't worry — no charges have been made. You can try again or contact us for help.
paymentFailed.step1Desc: Check your payment details and try a different payment method
paymentFailed.step2Desc: Reach out to info@proballfootball.com for assistance

auth.name: Full Name
auth.loginToAutofill: Have an account? Log in to autofill
auth.createAccountWithOrder: Create an account with this order
auth.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
